case_title: MARIANS MERCHANDISE CO. INC. VS LOPEZ CRISTINA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $430.84 FILED BY MARIANS MERCHANDISE CO. INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ CRISTINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
